findings: Commander agent requires swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl as live source-of-truth and mandates launch_requested/launch_started/completed flow.
Premium child-model pool, banned models, Depth Guard, and 50x5 bounded launch proof are explicitly specified.
Partial and failed outcomes are clearly defined for incomplete or zero-squad launches.
Gap: commander instructions do not define a concrete recovery/requeue protocol or a bus-specific ledger schema beyond launch telemetry.
